resources.string: Document limit reached (100). Delete existing documents to create new ones.
Less than 100 MB available. Your scan may fail to save. Free up space and try again.
Not enough storage. Free up at least 50 MB to scan.
This document and all its pages will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
Camera access is required to scan documents.
Google Play Services needs to be updated to use document scanning.
Warning: All documents will be deleted when you uninstall this app.
